title: Glowing Minimal Armor
description: Make "My Minimal Armor" have trims that glow in the dark, Shiny, Visible, Emissive, Outline, Trims, 1.20, Limited Life Like
body:
# **Glow in the dark "My Minimal Armor" trims**

![enter image description here](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/P8J4jXN1/images/8c091513ac5935002cfcd53a52208246169bc50f.png)

requires emissive textures. [Optifine](https://www.optifine.net/downloads)

[CurseForge Listing](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/glowing-minimal-armor-countxd)
